entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `subjectId` TEXT NOT NULL, `fingerIdentifier` INTEGER, `templateData` BLOB NOT NULL, `format` TEXT NOT NULL, `referenceId` TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`subjectId`) REFERENCES `DbSubject`(`subjectId`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )
